message:
fix(abi): fix getsubopt comma-aliasing bug, resolve 48 Rust 2024 E0133 warnings

getsubopt: name_end==end when no '=' present, so NUL-terminating at
name_end destroyed the comma byte before the advance check read it.
Fix: capture at_comma flag before NUL-termination.

glibc_internal_abi: wrap all unsafe fn delegation calls in explicit
unsafe{} blocks per Rust 2024 edition semantics (unsafe fn body is
no longer an implicit unsafe context). Also remove unreachable
AF_LOCAL arm (AF_LOCAL == AF_UNIX on Linux).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
